successCriteria.description: src/modules/notification/notification.service.ts exists and exports NotificationService implementing INotificationService with all required methods
NotificationService methods use the repository pattern (GP-001) and create audit logs (GP-002) for all state-changing operations
All notification data is sanitized using sanitizeForLogging before being logged to satisfy GP-004 (No sensitive data in logs)
Notification creation and update operations execute in separate database transactions (notification creation/update and audit logging are separate transactions)
tests/unit/modules/notification/notification.service.test.ts exists with Vitest tests covering all NotificationService methods

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through INotificationRepository interface (GP-001)
Audit records: All state-changing operations (create, update) write an audit record via AuditLogger (GP-002)
No sensitive data in logs: All notification data must be sanitized using sanitizeForLogging before logging (GP-004)
Error handling: All async operations must be wrapped in try-catch blocks (GP-006)
NotificationService must implement INotificationService interface with sendLeaveRequestNotification, sendBalanceUpdateNotification, markAsRead, and getUnreadNotifications methods
NotificationService must depend on INotificationRepository and AuditLogger
NotificationService must use canonical Notification interface with fields: id, recipientId, senderId, type, title, message, metadata, isRead, readAt, createdAt
All methods must validate inputs before processing
Unit tests must be written using Vitest (not Jest as mentioned in intent)
outOfScope: Notification pagination beyond basic limit parameter
